qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Offside, Ghana. Jordan Ayew is caught offside.
Attempt saved. Cecilio Waterman (Panama) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the top left corner by Lawrence Ati Zigi (Ghana). Assisted by Amir Murillo with a cross.
